extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael won from the breakaway while ROGLIC Primoz crashed attacking on the category 2 descent, losing red jersey to EIKING Odd Christian.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primoz attacked category 2 climb despite holding red jersey, revealing Jumbo willingness to race aggressively even from lead position.
TRENTINO Matteo attacked breakaway far before final climb base, fragmenting 31-rider group through excessive early aggression despite high tempo.
Jumbo-Visma intentionally gave virtual red jersey to EIKING Odd Christian before harder stages 11-12, avoiding workload on moderate terrain.
INEOS riders YATES Adam and BERNAL Egan dropped on relatively moderate category 2 when ROGLIC attacked, exposing weakness disproportionate to stage difficulty.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Won solo from breakaway and proved strong descending ability, showing versatility beyond pure climbing strength from stage 7 summit win.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Crashed on descent after attacking from lead, showing aggressive tactics but questionable risk management when holding jersey advantage.
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: positive: Took red jersey with 9 second gap requirement met, Inter Marche now controls race despite being non-GC focused squad.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Dropped on moderate category 2 when stage difficulty not proportionate to GC standing, indicating poor form for expected contender.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Dropped alongside Yates on relatively easy stage, INEOS morale at ultimate low per commentary assessment.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Set tempo for ROGLIC chase after crash, proving exceptional domestique performance throughout stage under pressure.
